## Search Results

You said: sllm

6:21 PM

An **sLLM** (==Small Large Language Model==) is a lightweight AI model designed to optimize efficiency, privacy, and speed. By reducing parameter size, sLLMs can run locally on edge devices or private corporate servers while minimizing operational costs, making them ideal for specialized, real-time business applications.

전자신문 +2

Here is a quick breakdown of how sLLMs compare to standard LLMs:

💡 Key Characteristics

- **Resource Efficiency:** Requires significantly less memory, computing power, and energy to run, enabling smooth "on-device AI" performance.
	KB Think +1
- **High Privacy:** Because they can operate locally, user or company data does not need to be sent to external cloud servers, drastically reducing security risks.
	Medium·파수 AI +2
- **Speed:** Smaller scale translates to faster response times and reduced latency for everyday tasks.
	전자신문 +2
- **Cost-Effective:** Both training and inference require far less capital and infrastructure compared to massive models.
	Naver Blog +1

⚖️ sLLM vs. Traditional LLM

<table><tbody><tr><th colspan="undefined">Feature</th><th colspan="undefined">sLLM (Small LLM)</th><th colspan="undefined">Traditional LLM</th></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined"><strong>Parameters</strong></td><td colspan="undefined">Typically 3B to 20B</td><td colspan="undefined">100B+</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined"><strong>Computing Needs</strong></td><td colspan="undefined">Low (runs on mobile, PCs, or small servers)</td><td colspan="undefined">High (requires massive cloud infrastructure)</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined"><strong>Best Used For</strong></td><td colspan="undefined">Specific tasks, on-device operations, privacy-sensitive data</td><td colspan="undefined">Complex reasoning, general knowledge, broad creativity</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined"><strong>Customization</strong></td><td colspan="undefined">Easier and faster to fine-tune for specific industries</td><td colspan="undefined">Requires large resources for fine-tuning</td></tr></tbody></table>

- **Google:** Gemma
- **Meta:** Llama series (e.g., Llama 3 8B)
- **Microsoft:** Phi-3
	전자신문 +2

To explore how these compact AI solutions might fit your specific use case, check out comparative overviews on [Superb AI](https://blog-ko.superb-ai.com/b2b-llm-vs-sllm-selection-guide-cost-performance-analysis/) or get industry-specific insights from [KB Think](https://kbthink.com/news-list/view.html?newsId=20260421073002302).

	소규모 대형 언어 모델(sLLM)이란? sLLM은 LLM의 '작은 형제'라고 할 수 있습니다. '소규모 대형'이라는 말이 모순처럼 들릴 수 있지만, 이는 LLM의 능력을 유지하면서도 크기를 줄인 모델을 의미합니다. sLLM은 LLM보...![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)
	Superb AI
